VisitorLog.title: Visitor Log
VisitorLog.description: Represents basic metadata collected during a landing page view for traffic audit purpose.

visitorId.description: Unique session placeholder for the current user device

visitedAt.description: The exact date-time stamp recorded when the page loaded

SignupRecord.title: Signup Record
SignupRecord.description: Stores user distribution licenses and demographic inputs securely.

fullName.description: Full legal name of the stem cell distributor

email.description: Official contact email address for corporate updates

phone.description: Official contact telephone number with country code

LoginEvent.title: Login Event
LoginEvent.description: Maintains log audits of authorized admin sessions.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Stores user orders and quantities securely.

fullName.description: Full name of the customer placing the order

email.description: Contact email address of the customer

phone.description: Contact phone number of the customer

orderedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when order was submitted

/visitors/{visitorId}.description: A collection containing anonymous traffic and visitor data.

/signups/{signupId}.description: A collection containing confirmed distributor signup requests.

/logins/{loginId}.description: A collection capturing user authentication logs.

/orders/{orderId}.description: A collection capturing client orders and automated notification triggers.
